title: Donut SMP PVP Pack (Fan Made)
description: A PVP Pack to use in servers like the Donut SMP
body:
This modpack is built specifically for a smooth, competitive Donut SMP experience. It focuses on boosting FPS, improving visuals, adding useful HUD features, and polishing gameplay without changing vanilla balance. All mods are client-side and fully allowed on most SMP servers.

**Features Include:**
• High FPS optimizations (Iris, Sodium, EntityCulling, ImmediatelyFast, FerriteCore)
• Clean visuals & customization (Iris shaders, Cloth Config, Konkrete, Lithium, Fabric API)
• Better UI & quality-of-life tools (Mousetweaks, Voice Chat, ModMenu, OkZoomer, Fullbright)
• Helpful info overlays (Armor HUD, Tooltip Improvements, Inventory HUD, TierTagger)
• Faster loading & stability (ForceCloseLoadingScreen, Fabric Language Kotlin, Crash fixes)

Whether you're grinding sets, escaping hackers, tracking players, or just exploring the world, this pack keeps everything smooth, readable, and lag-free. Perfect for competitive PvP, bases, and daily SMP gameplay.

Drop it in, launch, and dominate the Donut SMP.
